eval_results.name: branch-creation-flow
eval_results.key_finding: Branch feature/oauth2-social-login created from main; checkout confirmed with git switch output

eval_results.name: tdd-integration
eval_results.key_finding: TDD Red→Green→Refactor cycle enforced; failing test written first, implementation follows, all 8 tests pass

eval_results.name: worktree-mode-selection
eval_results.key_finding: Worktree mode selected for 2 independent parallel tasks; isolation rationale clearly explained

eval_results.name: subagent-delegation
eval_results.key_finding: backend-architect delegated with full context: spec reference, task details, and 4 verification criteria

eval_results.name: test-verification
eval_results.key_finding: pytest suite run: 12/12 passed; Phase C entry unlocked after successful test gate

strengths: Correct branch naming following feature/{spec-name} convention
Accurate worktree vs branch mode selection based on parallelism
Rich subagent delegation with spec context and acceptance criteria
Hard test gate before Phase C transition
recommendations: Test Phase B with failing tests to verify correct blocking behavior
Add edge cases for worktree cleanup after parallel task completion
Test subagent timeout handling when development stalls
